channel.title: Matt Wilson — Blog
channel.description: Writing about AI engineering, developer tools, and the craft of building software.

item.title: Building an Autonomous AI Developer Agent
item.description: How I built Ralph — an autonomous agent that reads your codebase, generates sprint specs, and ships features end-to-end without manual orchestration.

item.title: Shipping a Cross-Platform Fintech App with React Native
item.description: Lessons from building SF Mobile — a cross-platform wealth management app with biometric auth, real-time portfolios, and 4-language localisation.

item.title: Self-Taught to Senior Engineer in 4 Years
item.description: The honest account of going from zero programming knowledge to shipping production fintech — what actually mattered, what didn't, and what's still driving me.

item.title: Building a RAG Pipeline That Actually Works
item.description: What I learned building Athena — a personal AI assistant with ChromaDB vector search and Claude. The gap between RAG tutorials and production RAG is wide.

item.title: Specs Over Keystrokes: How AI Changes What Engineers Do
item.description: The engineering job is shifting from writing code to writing precise specifications and evaluating output. Here's what that looks like in practice — and why it demands more rigour, not less.
